Description: Simple Graph is an SVG area/line chart form control for the Decisions platform. It renders a line chart with optional gradient fill, data-point markers, and a dashed average line. Both Y values (double[]) and X labels (string[]) can be bound to flow data at runtime or configured statically at design time. X-axis labels are automatically thinned when there are too many data points to display comfortably. The graph color, Y-axis suffix, and chart height are all configurable.
